name: The Shooting Star of Dioskouroi
description:
I swore an oath to that shining star. I will win even if I am alone.

Character art by @itsukimaka

SETTING

The events are heavily inspired by Admire Vega's career scenarios in the game. Just a heads up though, It might have spoilers, so chat at your own risk! The bot already contains most of Umamusume Lore(huge thanks to @Jpeg23790 for the lorebook clone).

SCENARIO 1

Kikuka Sho is right around the corner. Troubled, Admire Vega faces more than just her rivals in the race, but also the ghost that haunts her deep in the bones.

More scenarios will be written in the future

POSSIBLE USER ROLES:

User isn't defined in the bot personality, so you're free to RP as anybody

- Trainer

- Umamusume Racer

- An established character from the series

- Maybe even the 'ghost' that haunts her

AUTHOR'S NOTES

I literally just pulled her in one try using free carats lmao. I loved her story so much to the point where I had to create a bot. Well, I'm back after several months.
creator: goshiiii_
